response: Aircraft stay up in sky thanks to a force called lift.  The lift on an aircraft follows the by weight principle, which states that the lift of an airplane must be slightly greater than the weight of the airplane for the aircraft to stay in the air. When the weight of an airplane is greater than its lift of the airplane, it will fall to the ground.  The weight of an airplane is caused by gravity, while The lift on the airplane is caused by the air passing of the wings.  As the the lift of the airplane becomes greater, its weight is overcome and allowing it to stay aloft in the air.

When energy is needed, the battery is discharged, and ions ions from the anode to the cathode (锂离子 are flow from cathode to anode), allowing electrons to flow from one terminal to another. After every two Pomodoros a short, break period is taken, around12-25 minutes, and every four Pomodoro a longer break period of around20 25minutesis taken. This technique is designed to ensure that work is completed in and and manner, with the necessary breaks to help the and focus and avoid productivity.

response: One popular simple card trick called the "The Hidden Ace" Trick: This Trick starts with having a volunteer shuffle a deck of 52 playing cards. The volunteer is the asked to pick a card fromled deck without looking at it. The volunteer then reveals the card card to picked. If the card is is Ace of of card, the volunteer has the Ace of Clubs hidden on the top of their deck.
